pandas_read_excel:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_excel('{path}', sheet_name='{sheet}')
pandas_to_excel:
import pandas as pd
df.to_excel('{output_path}', sheet_name='{sheet}', index=False)
pandas_head:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('{path}')
print(df.head({n}))
pandas_describe:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('{path}')
print(df.describe())
pandas_filter:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('{path}')
filtered = df[df['{column}'] == '{value}']
pandas_sort:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('{path}')
sorted_df = df.sort_values(by='{column}', ascending={ascending})
pandas_dropna:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('{path}')
df = df.dropna(subset=['{column}'])
pandas_concat:
import pandas as pd
df1 = pd.read_csv('{path1}')
df2 = pd.read_csv('{path2}')
result = pd.concat([df1, df2], ignore_index=True)
requests_get:
import requests
response = requests.get('{url}')
data = response.json()
requests_get_params:
import requests
params = {params}
response = requests.get('{url}', params=params)
data = response.json()
requests_post:
import requests
payload = {payload}
response = requests.post('{url}', json=payload)
data = response.json()
requests_session:
import requests
session = requests.Session()
session.headers.update({headers})
response = session.get('{url}')
requests_auth:
import requests
from requests.auth import HTTPBasicAuth
response = requests.get('{url}', auth=HTTPBasicAuth('{user}', '{password}'))
beautifulsoup_parse_html:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
soup = BeautifulSoup('{html}', 'html.parser')
beautifulsoup_find:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
soup = BeautifulSoup('{html}', 'html.parser')
element = soup.find('{tag}')
beautifulsoup_find_all:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
soup = BeautifulSoup('{html}', 'html.parser')
elements = soup.find_all('{tag}')
beautifulsoup_select:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
soup = BeautifulSoup('{html}', 'html.parser')
elements = soup.select('{css_selector}')
beautifulsoup_get_text:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
soup = BeautifulSoup('{html}', 'html.parser')
text = soup.get_text()
beautifulsoup_get_attribute:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
soup = BeautifulSoup('{html}', 'html.parser')
element = soup.find('{tag}')
attr_value = element.get('{attribute}')
beautifulsoup_parent:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
soup = BeautifulSoup('{html}', 'html.parser')
element = soup.find('{tag}')
parent = element.parent
beautifulsoup_children:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
soup = BeautifulSoup('{html}', 'html.parser')
element = soup.find('{tag}')
children = list(element.children)
beautifulsoup_iterate_links:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
soup = BeautifulSoup('{html}', 'html.parser')
for link in soup.find_all('a'):
    href = link.get('href')
    text = link.get_text()
pymupdf_extract_text:
import fitz
doc = fitz.open('{pdf_path}')
text = doc[{page_num}].get_text()
pymupdf_iterate_pages:
import fitz
doc = fitz.open('{pdf_path}')
for page_num, page in enumerate(doc):
    text = page.get_text()
    print(f'Page {page_num}: {text}')
pymupdf_extract_images:
import fitz
doc = fitz.open('{pdf_path}')
page = doc[{page_num}]
images = page.get_images()
for img in images:
    xref = img[0]
    pix = fitz.Pixmap(doc, xref)
pymupdf_search_text:
import fitz
doc = fitz.open('{pdf_path}')
page = doc[{page_num}]
rects = page.search_for('{search_text}')
pillow_open_image:
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open('{image_path}')
pillow_resize:
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open('{image_path}')
resized = img.resize(({width}, {height}))
pillow_save:
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open('{image_path}')
img.save('{output_path}')
pillow_convert_format:
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open('{input_path}')
img.convert('RGB').save('{output_path}')
pillow_crop:
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open('{image_path}')
cropped = img.crop(({left}, {top}, {right}, {bottom}))
pillow_rotate:
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open('{image_path}')
rotated = img.rotate({degrees})
pillow_filter:
from PIL import Image, ImageFilter
img = Image.open('{image_path}')
blurred = img.filter(ImageFilter.BLUR)
pillow_thumbnail:
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open('{image_path}')
img.thumbnail(({width}, {height}))
numpy_create_array:
import numpy as np
arr = np.array({data})
numpy_zeros:
import numpy as np
arr = np.zeros(({rows}, {cols}))
numpy_ones:
import numpy as np
arr = np.ones(({rows}, {cols}))
numpy_transpose:
import numpy as np
arr = np.array({data})
transposed = arr.T
numpy_sum:
import numpy as np
arr = np.array({data})
total = np.sum(arr)
numpy_mean:
import numpy as np
arr = np.array({data})
average = np.mean(arr)
numpy_std:
import numpy as np
arr = np.array({data})
standard_dev = np.std(arr)
matplotlib_plot:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.plot({x}, {y})
plt.xlabel('{xlabel}')
plt.ylabel('{ylabel}')
plt.show()
matplotlib_save_figure:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.plot({x}, {y})
plt.savefig('{output_path}')
matplotlib_bar_chart:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
data = {'Python': 35, 'JavaScript': 28, 'Go': 18, 'Rust': 12, 'Java': 22}
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.bar(data.keys(), data.values(), color='steelblue')
plt.xlabel('Language')
plt.ylabel('Usage %')
plt.title('Programming Language Usage')
plt.savefig('bar_chart.png', dpi=100, bbox_inches='tight')
print('Saved bar chart to bar_chart.png')
print(f'Categories: {len(data)}')
for k, v in data.items():
    print(f'  {k}: {v}')
matplotlib_multiple_plots:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.subplot(2, 1, 1)
plt.plot({x1}, {y1})
plt.subplot(2, 1, 2)
plt.plot({x2}, {y2})
plt.show()
matplotlib_legend:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.plot({x}, {y}, label='{label}')
plt.legend()
plt.show()
